subject: Coordination brief: guppy activities around Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-4541
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-4541. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
